title: Elizabeth Holmes Sentenced to More Than 11 Years for Defrauding Theranos Investors (DOJ, U.S. Attorney's Office, N.D. Cal.)
organization: U.S. Department of Justice — U.S. Attorney's Office, Northern District of California
bias_or_interest: Government (prosecution) record. Authoritative for the convictions and the 135-month sentence.
quotation_note: Government work; factual statements safe; state convictions as fact.
notes: Holmes: convicted on 4 investor-fraud counts (Jan 3 2022); sentenced 135 months (Nov 18 2022).

title: Theranos President Sentenced to More Than 12 Years for Fraud That Jeopardized Patient Health (DOJ, N.D. Cal.)
organization: U.S. Department of Justice — U.S. Attorney's Office, Northern District of California
bias_or_interest: Government (prosecution) record. Authoritative for Balwani's convictions (incl. patient counts) and ~155-month sentence.
relevant_locations: Balwani conviction on all 12 counts (incl. patient)
quotation_note: Government work; factual; state convictions as fact.
notes: Balwani: convicted on all 12 counts (incl. patient); sentenced ~155 months ('nearly 13 years').

title: Theranos, CEO Holmes, and Former President Balwani Charged With Massive Fraud (SEC Press Release 2018-41)
bias_or_interest: Government regulator record. Authoritative for the 2018 SEC fraud charges and Holmes's civil settlement terms.
relevant_locations: Holmes civil settlement ($500k, 10-yr officer/director ban, no admission)
notes: SEC charged massive fraud (Mar 2018); Holmes settled civilly without admitting/denying; useful for the false-claims summary.

title: Trial of Elizabeth Holmes / Theranos — overview (Wikipedia)
bias_or_interest: Neutral aggregator. Used for the exact verdict split (4 guilty investor / 4 acquitted patient / 3 hung) and context (2003 founding, WSJ 2015 exposé, third-party machines).
notes: Verdict: 4 guilty (investor: 1 conspiracy + 3 wire fraud), 4 acquitted (patient), 3 hung (investor). Cross-check with SRC-0001/0003.
